name: reframe
description: Programmable design engine — parse, validate, transform, export.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:cli && npm run build:mcp
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npx tsx scripts/test-pipeline.ts && npx tsx scripts/test-reframe-all.ts

author: Ilya Makarov
